summary: More reliable mail alerts, clearer inbox loading, and easier-to-read dock badges.

introduced: Inbox shows a loading indicator while Gmail is loading instead of a blank panel
changed: Dock unread badges are larger and scale with your Dock icon size
Add Gmail Account in Inbox opens the Accounts workspace instead of an inline sheet
fixed: Mail notifications fire when unread count rises during background sync, including secondary mailboxes
Gmail atom feed sync tries multiple account URLs so non-primary inboxes stay in sync
Refreshing mail on app activation runs a full sync, not just a web unread poll
removed: Use for Notes picker in Accounts — notes sync through iCloud instead of a Gmail account
